contacts.name: Wells Fargo Dealer Services — Payoff Processing

emails.subject: Payoff Application Error — Please Review — Ref WFB-2026-DPO-88491
emails.body_text:
Dear Sunshine & Set Automotive Accounting,

Re: ACH Dealer Payoff — Reference WFB-2026-DPO-88491

We are writing to notify you of a pending exception on an ACH payment received April 23, 2026, in the amount of $12,610.00.

Payment Details:
  ACH Amount: $12,610.00
  ACH Reference: REF#90181034
  Receiving Account: xxxx-4421

Vehicle and Obligation Information:
  Borrower: Morales
  VIN (Last 6): QQ3317
  Vehicle: 2017 Honda Accord
  Associated Obligation Account: xxxx-7809
  Current Payoff Balance (as of 04/24/2026): $12,875.00
  Good Through: April 30, 2026
  Per Diem: $4.18

Exception Summary:
The receiving account referenced in the ACH remittance does not correspond to the obligation account associated with the vehicle and borrower identified in the payment instructions. Automatic application of the payment has been suspended pending resolution.

Resolution Required:
A payment reallocation or corrected remittance is required within 3 business days of this notice. Until resolved, the lien on the associated obligation account will not be released and title processing will remain on hold.

To initiate resolution, contact our Dealer Payoff Resolution team at (800) 555-3201 (select option 3) or respond to this notice referencing WFB-2026-DPO-88491.

Sincerely,
Dealer Payoff Processing Center
Wells Fargo Dealer Services
(800) 555-3201 | payoffs@wellsfargo.com

emails.subject: Deal 4481 / Hernandez — desk recap vs deal log — delivery today
emails.body_text:
Hi Jasmine,

Wanted to flag this before Carlos Hernandez comes in for his delivery today.

I was reviewing the deal file for 4481 (Stock U-2241, VIN last 6: 109189, 2023 Toyota Camry SE) and I noticed the gross figure in the deal log does not match the signed desk recap. The recap I approved shows total gross of $9,200.00 (front: $3,800 / back: $5,400). I am attaching a PDF copy of the signed recap for reference.

Dion mentioned there was some back-and-forth on the trade allowance with the customer near the end of the deal — not sure if something got re-entered incorrectly. Just want to make sure this is squared away before Carlos takes delivery.

Thanks,
Sofia

Sofia Ramirez | F&I Director
Sunshine & Set Automotive
sofia.ramirez@sunshineandsetauto.com | (407) 555-0198

emails.subject: Chargeback Notice — CB Ref CB-2608 — Account: Sunshine & Set Automotive
emails.body_text:
CHARGEBACK NOTICE
Meridian GAP Services — Dealer Accounting
Date: April 24, 2026

To: Sunshine & Set Automotive | Attention: Accounting Department

CB Reference: CB-2608
Contract Number: MGS-2026-4451
Customer Name: Rosa Castellano
Contract Date: March 15, 2026
Chargeback Amount: $1,600.00
Cancellation Effective Date: April 1, 2026

The above-referenced GAP contract has been cancelled per customer request received April 1, 2026. Per the terms of the dealer agreement, a chargeback of $1,600.00 is due and will be deducted from your next reserve statement unless offset by this notice.

Please acknowledge receipt and post to your accounting records accordingly.

For questions: (800) 555-7744 | dealer.chargebacks@meridiangap.com

Meridian GAP Services
2200 Commerce Blvd, Tampa, FL 33612

emails.subject: Quick Q — ACV sanity check before Manheim run
emails.body_text:
Hey Jasmine,

No rush on this, but whenever you get a free minute — could you pull the book cost / ACV for U-2196 (2018 Chevy Traverse LT) and U-2203 (2019 Ford Fusion SE)? Thinking about sending them to Manheim next Thursday if the numbers make sense, and I just want a quick gut-check against what we have in the inventory schedule before I put in the auction entry.

Nothing urgent — just do not want to wholesale at a loss if I can help it.

Thanks
Trent Holloway | Used Car Manager
Sunshine & Set Automotive | (407) 555-0147

emails.subject: Deal 4462 / Watkins — stip status & funding timeline
emails.body_text:
Hi Jasmine,

Quick update on the Watkins deal (4462, Stock U-2205, Chase Auto Finance). I posted the missing-stip escalation to #acct-contracts-funding yesterday morning — the outstanding item is the proof of insurance card.

As of this morning we are at calendar day 4 on the CIT aging. Contract value is $18,500, so the standard 5-day unfunded escalation timeline to Marcus Hale applies (not the accelerated 3-day timeline for contracts over $25k). If the stip does not come in by tomorrow, I will escalate to Marcus per section 2.2.

Sofia confirmed she is in direct contact with the customer and expects the insurance doc by EOD today. If it comes in, I will submit the completed funding package to Chase immediately and we should fund by Monday.

I have updated the funding tracker and will keep monitoring. Just wanted you to have the full picture in case anyone asks.

Thanks,
Noah Alvarez | Funding & Contracts Clerk
Sunshine & Set Automotive | (407) 555-0162

emails.subject: Deal Gross Variance — Deal #4467 / Mbeki
emails.body_text:
The posted deal gross for Deal #4467 (Mbeki, Stock #U-2210, VIN ending 230918) does not tie to the approved desk recap.

Approved gross: $7,200.00
Posted gross: $6,880.00
Variance: -$320.00

Source of difference: back-end product income — VSC was voided after initial posting but not reflected in the recap total.

Please confirm the correct figure or provide an updated approval so the deal can be finalized. The deal will remain unposted until this is resolved.

Attach: buyers order, desk recap, and deal log excerpt showing the discrepancy.

Jasmine Patel | Senior Deal Posting Specialist
Sunshine & Set Automotive

emails.subject: RE: Deal Gross Variance — Deal #4467 / Mbeki
emails.body_text: Hi Jasmine, VSC was voided at customer request before signing. Correct gross is $6,880.00 — please use that for final posting. Sorry for the confusion! — Sofia

emails.subject: RE: Commission sheet — March 16-31 / Vasquez deal 4442
emails.body_text: Jasmine / Leah, Deal 4442 (Tran) gross figure on Vasquez March 16-31 commission sheet is $1,950 which matches the deal log. Commission sheet correct as submitted. Leah please include in April 1 payroll. No further action needed. — Marcus Hale, Assistant Controller

emails.subject: April 2026 Close Calendar
emails.body_text:
Team,

April close calendar dates are now in the shared Calendar. All deal postings for April must be finalized by April 30 (last BD of month). BD1=5/1, BD2=5/4, BD3=5/5, BD5=5/7, BD7 close sign-off=5/11. Questions — see me or Marcus.

Elena Brooks | Controller | Sunshine & Set Automotive
